feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red and Antman reached Route 5 after recovering Cerulean's stolen TM.

feed.speaker: Misty
feed.text: Misty scouted the Underground Path entrance and confirmed the southbound route is open but watched.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill traced the Rocket TM resale route toward Vermilion's docks and S.S. Anne cargo traffic.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Vermilion City lead registered. The next Kanto chapter centers on the port, Surge's gym, and Rocket shipping pressure.
